---
title: "CV"
---

[📄 Download CV (PDF)](/en/cv.pdf)

---

# Profile

Joint PhD candidate (EPHE-PSL / UCLouvain) transitioning into data analysis.

I leverage strong analytical and structuring skills to process complex data and produce rigorous, interpretable, and decision-oriented analyses.

My approach focuses on transforming heterogeneous data into actionable insights through analytical methods, visualization, and clear communication.

---

# Experience

## Université Paris Sciences et Lettres (PSL)  
**PhD Candidate – Data analysis and complex data structuring**  
Paris | 2023–2026  

- Built and structured multi-source datasets (cleaning, normalization, disambiguation).
- Designed relational and graph data models (SQLite, Neo4j).
- Developed analytical workflows in R (tidyverse): transformation, aggregation, EDA.
- Produced reproducible analytical reports (Quarto).
- Conducted network analysis to identify structures and patterns.

---

## Université Paris Nanterre  
**Teaching Assistant – Data analysis and modeling**  
Nanterre | 2025  

- Taught data structuring and variable formalization.
- Introduced modeling of relationships between variables.
- Trained students in applied statistical methods (t-tests, ANOVA, OLS regression, PCA).
- Supervised analysis, interpretation, and reporting.

---

## Université Paris Lumières  
**Operations Manager – Process analysis and optimization**  
Campus Condorcet | 2023  

- Analyzed and optimized organizational processes.
- Defined and monitored key performance indicators (KPIs).
- Structured and improved reliability of data flows.
- Coordinated stakeholders and managed operations.

---

# Skills

## Data analysis
- Data cleaning and transformation  
- Exploratory data analysis (EDA)  
- Descriptive and statistical analysis  
- Modeling  
- Analytical reporting  

## Data tools
- R (tidyverse, ggplot2)  
- Python (pandas, numpy)  
- SQL (in progress)  
- Neo4j  
- Jamovi, Stata  

## Business analysis
- Problem structuring  
- Process mapping  
- KPI tracking  
- Continuous improvement  

## Tools
- Git / GitHub  
- Excel / Google Sheets  
- Quarto / Markdown  
- Notion / Trello  

## Languages
French C1 · English C1 · Ukrainian C2 · Russian C2 · Greek B2  

---

# Education

## PhD – History (ongoing)  
EPHE-PSL / UCLouvain  
Since 2023  

## Master’s degree – Civilizations, cultures, societies  
EPHE-PSL  
2022–2023 · Highest honors  

## Bachelor’s degree – Psychology  
Université Paris Nanterre  

---

# Certifications

2024 — Cypher and Graph Data Modeling (Neo4j GraphAcademy)  
2024 — Introduction to R (EPHE-PSL)
